description: Simulate a clinical Operating Room (OR) turnover workflow in OpenICE, transitioning from Case A to Case B. Initially, configure a 'Capnograph' and a 'Multiparameter Monitor' for Case A. Perform the turnover by clearing the Case A session and then configure an 'Infusion Pump' and a 'Pulse Oximeter' for Case B. Document the completion of the turnover by creating a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/turnover_log.txt containing the text 'Turnover Complete' followed by the names of the two devices created for Case B. Do not close the main OpenICE Supervisor window during this process.
